'''vataha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:drabler|drabler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drabler|drabler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vataha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vætæhæth|vætæhæth]] || [[word:vætæhæj|vætæhæj]] || [[word:vætæhæsh|vætæhæsh]] || [[word:vætæhæ|vætæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vatatahath|vatatahath]] || [[word:vatatahaj|vatatahaj]] || [[word:vatatahash|vatatahash]] || [[word:vatataha|vatataha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vatahath|vatahath]] || [[word:vatahaj|vatahaj]] || [[word:vatahash|vatahash]] || [[word:vataha|vataha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vatafhath|vatafhath]] || [[word:vatafhaj|vatafhaj]] || [[word:vatafhash|vatafhash]] || [[word:vatafhaf|vatafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vatahatha|vatahatha]] || [[word:vatahaja|vatahaja]] || [[word:vatahasha|vatahasha]] || [[word:vatahaka|vatahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vatahath|vatahath]] || [[word:vatahaj|vatahaj]] || [[word:vatahash|vatahash]] || [[word:vataha|vataha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vatahathal|vatahathal]] || [[word:vatahajal|vatahajal]] || [[word:vatahashal|vatahashal]] || [[word:vatahakal|vatahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vatahathatha|vatahathatha]] || [[word:vatahajaja|vatahajaja]] || [[word:vatahashasha|vatahashasha]] || [[word:vatahaka|vatahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vatahathan|vatahathan]] || [[word:vatahajan|vatahajan]] || [[word:vatahashan|vatahashan]] || [[word:vatahakan|vatahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vatahathaoro|vatahathaoro]] || [[word:vatahajaoro|vatahajaoro]] || [[word:vatahashaoro|vatahashaoro]] || [[word:vatahakaoro|vatahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
